'''鈭歮-t-k-y''' ('''kamatkeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyberneticize|cyberneticize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyberneticize|cyberneticize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-t-k-y
|-
! Lemma
| kamatkeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimatkeyoko|thimatkeyoko]] || [[word:jimatkeyoko|jimatkeyoko]] || [[word:shimatkeyoko|shimatkeyoko]] || [[word:kimatkeyoko|kimatkeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumatkeyoko|thuthumatkeyoko]] || [[word:jujumatkeyoko|jujumatkeyoko]] || [[word:shushumatkeyoko|shushumatkeyoko]] || [[word:kukumatkeyoko|kukumatkeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumatkeyoko|thumatkeyoko]] || [[word:jumatkeyoko|jumatkeyoko]] || [[word:shumatkeyoko|shumatkeyoko]] || [[word:kumatkeyoko|kumatkeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
